color: Vanilla Beige, Pink Guava, Cherry and Sweet Mint
description: Summer Fridays The Lip Butter Balm Minis - Vanilla Beige, Pink Guava, Cherry and Sweet Mint (.16 Oz each). Vanilla Beige, a sheer beige with a hint of vanilla sweetness; Pink Guava, a sheer bright pink with a hint of sweet guava flavor; Cherry, a sheer red lip balm with a hint of cherry sweetness ; and Sweet Mint, a sheer clear with a hint of sweet mint flavor.
features: Summer Fridays The Lip Butter Balm Minis
This Set Contains: 4 x 0.16 oz/ 5 mL Lip Butter Balm in Vanilla Beige, Pink Guava, Cherry, Sweet Mind
A limited-edition set featuring mini sizes of the award-winning Lip Butter Balm in four flavors.
ingredients: Phytosteryl/Isostearyl/Cetyl/Stearyl/Behenyl Dimer Dilinoleate, Diisostearyl Malate, Hydrogenated Polyisobutene, Polybutene, Hydrogenated Poly (C6-14 Olefin), Butyrospermum Parkii (Shea) Butter, Microcrystalline Wax/Cera Microcristallina/Cire Microcristalline, Octyldodecanol, Synthetic Wax, Disteardimonium Hectorite, Astrocaryum Murumuru Seed Butter, Sodium Hyaluronate, Vanillin, Tocopherol, Propylene Carbonate, Polyglyceryl-2 Diisostearate, Mica, BHT, Titanium Dioxide (CI 77891), Iron Oxides
shortDescription: Summer Fridays The Lip Butter Balm Minis - Vanilla Beige, Pink Guava, Cherry and Sweet Mint (.16 Oz each).
specialIngredients: Astrocaryum Murumuru Seed Butter, Sodium Hyaluronate
